visualEvidenceMust: produce or update a visual evidence artifact for each meaningful slice
distinguish passed artifacts from blocked, deferred, and stale artifacts
link to textual reports and receipts
start as ASCII and remain renderable through the visualProjectionModel later
textualEvidenceMust: point to the receipts or explicitly say why receipts are deferred
visualEvidenceMustNot: pretend a renderer exists when it does not
claim equivalence beyond the evidence available
completionPosture: Slice 007M.1 is complete when meaningful-slice reporting has a required visual evidence standard and the evidence is still clearly subordinate to textual receipts and reports.
